description: Existing Node.js Fastify app without auth. User asks for a full JWT auth flow with refresh token rotation and logout invalidation.
user_message: Add JWT-based authentication to our Fastify app at services/api. Requirements: short-lived access tokens (15 min), refresh tokens with rotation on use, secure HttpOnly cookies, /auth/login, /auth/refresh, /auth/logout endpoints. Logout must invalidate the refresh token server-side. Pin the algorithm and reject 'none'. Include rate limiting on the login endpoint.
notes: Auth and secrets scope per AGENTS.md routing. Triggers security as the primary rule, plus testing because auth needs negative-path tests, plus database-design because the refresh token store is persistent.
